title: Total Battle: Strategy Games
notes:
Your Kingdom grows stronger, Your Majesty. Check out what V345 has in store for you:

Bug Fixes
- We've implemented a potential fix for the visual bug affecting the display of Valor points earned in Seasonal Tournaments.
- In the War Tools event, some players did not receive points for gathering Sacred Potions. We've taken steps to resolve this issue.
- In rare cases, some players were unable to apply Speedups to their marches. We've worked on addressing this.
- We've found a potential resolutio

title: Langrisser SEA
notes:
[New Heroes]
New SSR hero Humbaba makes her debut.

[New Enchantment Resonance Available]
Brand new Enchantment Resonances "Morning Glory," "Kindling" and "Light Curtain" will be up for grabs

[New Stage]
The daily Secret Realm event "Goddess Trial" unlocks its level 75 stage!

title: Haunted Merge: Horror Story

title: Hay Day
notes:
Hay Day is celebrating its 14th anniversary! Join the party with music, rewards, music festival decorations, and a series of very special events.

Birthday celebrations
- Create music, collect musical notes, and unlock music festival decorations.
- Take part in special birthday events across the farm.
- You can also turn the birthday music on or off in Settings.

Boat Orders rework
